description: A square graphic built around a photograph of a man with short dark hair and a goatee, wearing a dark patterned shirt, standing indoors. A red banner in the top right reads NEWARK, NJ. Large light-blue text near the bottom reads ARRESTED, with smaller text below reading FACING REMOVAL, beside a Department of Homeland Security seal and the letters ICE.
notable_text: NEWARK, NJ; ARRESTED; FACING REMOVAL; ICE
